proven.claim: Ordering constraint: blank log at 301 executes only after for-of loop exhausts changes
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 301
; Ordering constraint: blank log at 301 executes only after for-of loop exhausts changes
; Prove: iterations_completed == changes_length when line 301 executes

(declare-const changes_length Int)
(declare-const iterations_completed Int)
(declare-const line_301_executes Int)

; Transition: for-of over an array completes all iterations before continuing
(assert (>= changes_length 1))
(assert (=> (= line_301_executes 1) (= iterations_completed changes_length)))

; Attempt to falsify: blank log fires before loop fully completes
(assert (= line_301_executes 1))
(assert (< iterations_completed changes_length))
(check-sat)
